title: potentilla hirta subsp. pedata
intro: Potentilla hirta subsp. pedata, also known as Silver Buffaloberry or Woolly Buffaloberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla hirta subsp. pedata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, dysentery, and skin irritations.
